name: Apricot Dreams
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a food processor. Pulse until combined.
Add butter and cream cheese; pulse until the mixture is crumbly.
Add coconut and half of the apricot preserves; blend until just moistened.
Be careful not to over mix the batter. The cookies should be light and airy.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until set.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
Frosting: In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, preserves, and butter. Spread frosting on cooled cookies.
